name: 🔥💯The Princess is feeling so Lonely..~💯🔥 – FPE
description:
• [ Basically Oliver went missing (died) and Alice was left alone. So your dumbass wanted to test luck and see if you could keep that dommy mommy for yourself. Cuz if that twink with his shit-eating grin and his pencil dick was able to rizz her up, why your freaky ass couldn't? ] •

"I'll be honest, I saw this pick and good my bulb lit. She's domiant, something I ain't used to do, but you can subdue her and make her your bitch... Somehow Enough, enjoy!" – IC-NUTS

Note: the original plan was to make her eating a submarie sandwitch, but I was too complex for my lame ass to do so. Fixed some gramatical errors, the ones I saw.

Note: Got rid of grammar errors on the first message and tweaked some stuff here and there. Damn, this bot has become the most popular one, I mever thought it could outweight the bullies one. Thank you guys 🩵🩵🩵
